title: MDX expected closing div tag
rationale: Same MDX parse boundary family as CLI-44.
fixSummary: Wrap replaceImagePathsAndUrls calls in DocsDefinitionResolver.resolve and getPreviewDocsDefinition with try/catch → CliError(ParseError).
problemSignature: MDX parse error surfaced as InternalError from unwrapped replaceImagePathsAndUrls call sites.
